task_completion.description: Load the ExamAnxiety.csv dataset into JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: JASP application window is open displaying the data from ExamAnxiety.csv, with the 'Exam' column visible.

task_completion.description: Open One-Sample T-Test and select the 'Exam' variable
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'One-Sample T-Test' analysis panel is open in JASP, and the 'Exam' variable has been moved into the 'Variables' box.

task_completion.description: Configure Wilcoxon test, test value, location parameter, and descriptives
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JASP analysis panel: 'Test value' is set to 50. Under 'Tests', 'Student' is unchecked and 'Wilcoxon signed-rank' is checked. Under 'Additional Statistics', 'Location parameter' and 'Confidence interval' are checked. 'Descriptives' is also checked.

task_completion.description: Generate the correct Wilcoxon test results in JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP results pane displays a 'One-Sample Wilcoxon Signed-Rank Test' table showing a p-value of approximately 0.0129 and a Hodges-Lehmann Estimate of 57.50. A Descriptive Statistics table is also visible.

task_completion.description: Save the JASP analysis file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager shows the file 'Exam_Wilcoxon_Test.jasp' saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/' directory, or the JASP window title reflects this filename.

task_completion.description: Create the median_analysis_report.txt with the required statistical values
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displays the contents of 'median_analysis_report.txt' in '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/', explicitly containing the Test Statistic (W), the p-value (~0.0129), and the Hodges-Lehmann estimate (57.50).

integrity.description: Agent used the JASP GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the JASP graphical user interface (menus, checkboxes, result tables) rather than just running a Python/R script in the terminal to bypass the application.

integrity.description: Agent extracted values from the JASP analysis rather than hallucinating or hardcoding
integrity.visual_evidence: The text report creation happens after the JASP results are generated, and the values in the text report match the values shown in the JASP results pane.

integrity.description: Agent saved files in the exact requested directory
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in save dialogs, terminal commands, or file managers strictly point to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/' for both the .jasp file and the .txt report.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct analysis is a One-Sample Wilcoxon Signed-Rank Test on the 'Exam' variable with a test value of 50. Expected JASP settings: Student T-Test disabled, Wilcoxon enabled, Location parameter enabled, Confidence interval enabled, and Descriptives enabled. The correct statistical outputs are: p-value ≈ 0.0129, and Hodges-Lehmann estimate = 57.50. Expected output files are /home/ga/Documents/JASP/Exam_Wilcoxon_Test.jasp and /home/ga/Documents/JASP/median_analysis_report.txt.
